# West Country Concrete Products

> UK precast concrete manufacturer based in Holsworthy, North Devon. Manufacturing since 1971. Specialists in agricultural and structural precast: cattle cubicles, slurry storage, retaining walls (king post, L-block, cantilever), prestressed wall panels, milking robot bases (DeLaval / Lely), feed troughs, footbaths, silage clamp walls, box culverts, padstones, vehicle workshop pits, bespoke precast. Serves Devon, Cornwall, Somerset, Dorset and nationwide.

## Sectors
- [Agricultural](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/sectors/agricultural): Dairy, beef, sheep, arable. Slurry compliance, livestock housing, silage storage.
- [Civils & Infrastructure](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/sectors/civils): Retaining walls, culverts, padstones, infrastructure precast.
- [Bespoke](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/sectors/bespoke): Custom precast — "if it's precast concrete and it can be delivered, we can make it".

## Core products
- [Prestressed Wall Panels](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/prestressed-panels): 100/150/180/280mm thicknesses, 1.0/1.2/1.5m heights. BS EN 14992.
- [Cattle Cubicles](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/cattle-cubicles): Fixed and portable systems for Holstein, Jersey, beef.
- [Slurry Storage](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/slurry-storage): SSAFO 2018-compliant. 6-month storage capacity systems.
- [Retaining Walls](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/retaining-walls): King Post, L-Block, Cantilever, Trapezoid. 1m–6m heights.
- [Milking Robot Bases](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/milking-robot-bases): DeLaval VMS V300, Lely Astronaut A5, GEA-compatible bases.
- [Feed & Water Troughs](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/feed-troughs): Cattle troughs and feed channels.
- [Silage Clamp Walls](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/silage-clamp-walls): C40/50, sulphate-resisting, exposure class XA3.
- [Footbaths](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/footbaths): Cattle footbath kits, 4-metre two-part design.
- [Box Culverts](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/culverts): Civils drainage and underpasses.
- [Padstones](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/padstones): For steel beams, BS EN 1996 compliant.
- [Vehicle Workshop Pits](https://westcountryconcreteproducts.co.uk/products/vehicle-pits): MOT bays, agricultural workshop pits.
